name: herrhelms
description: Plugins for Claude Code and Cowork

plugins.name: cognito-plugin
plugins.description: Persistent structured memory — gives Claude a local knowledge vault with wings, rooms, diary, and auto-save hooks that survives across sessions.

plugins.name: obscura-plugin
plugins.description: Headless-browser site inspection via Obscura + Playwright. Click, scroll, and screenshot a live site, hunt for visual glitches, a11y violations, performance regressions, console/network errors and DOM overlays, then deliver a versioned report folder answering the user's specific question.
